request.prompt_preview:
# Low-Code Orchestration Agent

You are a low-code orchestration agent for ActionDesign. Your job is to understand the user's business request, choose registered orchestration elements, and create valid action nodes through tools. Static instructions are in English; business data such as component names, field labels, and user-provided text may appear in their original language and must be preserved.

## Core Constraints

1. Use only registered elements from the compact element catalog below.
2.

blocks.text:
继续为培训地点的空值判断添加提示和退出节点，然后完成剩余字段验证。

[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "OpenMessageDialog", "title": "提示：请填写培训地点", "targetAction": "validateBeforeSubmit", "insertAfterKey": "__last__", "inputParams": {"message": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": "请填写培训地点", "dataType": "string", "label": "请填写培训地点", "code": "'请填写培训地点'"}, "type": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": "error", "dataType": "string", "label": "错误", "code": "'error'"}, "duration": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": 3, "dataType": "number", "label": "3", "code": "3"}}})
[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "ExitAction", "title": "退出验证", "targetAction": "validateBeforeSubmit", "insertAfterKey": "__last__", "inputParams": {"returnValue": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": false, "dataType": "boolean", "label": "false", "code": "false"}}})
[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "NullCondition", "title": "判断培训师是否为空", "targetAction": "validateBeforeSubmit", "inputParams": {"parameter": {"paramTypes": "componentsVariable", "value": "trainer_id", "dataType": "string", "label": "页面组件-trainer_id", "code": "inbiz('trainer_id').value"}}})
[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "OpenMessageDialog", "title": "提示：请选择培训师", "targetAction": "validateBeforeSubmit", "insertAfterKey": "__last__", "inputParams": {"message": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": "请选择培训师", "dataType": "string", "label": "请选择培训师", "code": "'请选择培训师'"}, "type": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": "error", "dataType": "string", "label": "错误", "code": "'error'"}, "duration": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": 3, "dataType": "number", "label": "3", "code": "3"}}})
[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "ExitAction", "title": "退出验证", "targetAction": "validateBeforeSubmit", "insertAfterKey": "__last__", "inputParams": {"returnValue": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": false, "dataType": "boolean", "label": "false", "code": "false"}}})
[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "NullCondition", "title": "判断课时是否为空", "targetAction": "validateBeforeSubmit", "inputParams": {"parameter": {"paramTypes": "componentsVariable", "value": "class_hour", "dataType": "string", "label": "页面组件-class_hour", "code": "inbiz('class_hour').value"}}})
[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "OpenMessageDialog", "title": "提示：请填写课时", "targetAction": "validateBeforeSubmit", "insertAfterKey": "__last__", "inputParams": {"message": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": "请填写课时", "dataType": "string", "label": "请填写课时", "code": "'请填写课时'"}, "type": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": "error", "dataType": "string", "label": "错误", "code": "'error'"}, "duration": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": 3, "dataType": "number", "label": "3", "code": "3"}}})
[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "ExitAction", "title": "退出验证", "targetAction": "validateBeforeSubmit", "insertAfterKey": "__last__", "inputParams": {"returnValue": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": false, "dataType": "boolean", "label": "false", "code": "false"}}})
[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "NullCondition", "title": "判断可自主学习是否为空", "targetAction": "validateBeforeSubmit", "inputParams": {"parameter": {"paramTypes": "componentsVariable", "value": "self_learning", "dataType": "string", "label": "页面组件-self_learning", "code": "inbiz('self_learning').value"}}})
[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "OpenMessageDialog", "title": "提示：请选择可自主学习", "targetAction": "validateBeforeSubmit", "insertAfterKey": "__last__", "inputParams": {"message": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": "请选择可自主学习", "dataType": "string", "label": "请选择可自主学习", "code": "'请选择可自主学习'"}, "type": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": "error", "dataType": "string", "label": "错误", "code": "'error'"}, "duration": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": 3, "dataType": "number", "label": "3", "code": "3"}}})
[TOOL_CALL] create_node({"elementKey": "ExitAction", "title": "退出验证", "targetAction": "validateBeforeSubmit", "insertAfterKey": "__last__", "inputParams": {"returnValue": {"paramTypes": "custom", "value": false, "dataType": "boolean", "label": "false", "code": "false"}}})
